_comment: Per-field descriptions sent in the JSON Schema's `description` property. Terse keyword anchors only — global rules (blank-vs-zero, format preservation, column logic) live in document_annotation_prompt to avoid attention competition with OCR text. Empty string drops the description.
checkbox_need_assistance_yes: Section 1 Q1 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — APPLICANT-section YES box.
checkbox_need_assistance_no: Section 1 Q1 'Are you still in need of assistance?' — APPLICANT-section NO box.
checkbox_family_assets_yes: Section 1 Q2 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — YES box.
checkbox_family_assets_no: Section 1 Q2 'Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?' — NO box.
checkbox_shelter_yes: Section 1 Q3 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — YES box.
checkbox_shelter_no: Section 1 Q3 'Any changes to your shelter costs?' — NO box.
checkbox_dependants_yes: Section 1 Q4 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — YES box.
checkbox_dependants_no: Section 1 Q4 'Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?' — NO box.
checkbox_employment_changes_yes: Section 1 Q5 'Any employment changes?' — APPLICANT row, YES box (left column).
checkbox_employment_changes_no: Section 1 Q5 'Any employment changes?' — APPLICANT row, NO box (left column).
checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_yes: Section 1 Q5 'Any employment changes?' — SPOUSE row, YES box (right column).
checkbox_employment_changes_spouse_no: Section 1 Q5 'Any employment changes?' — SPOUSE row, NO box (right column).
checkbox_school_yes: Section 1 Q6 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — APPLICANT row, YES box.
checkbox_school_no: Section 1 Q6 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — APPLICANT row, NO box.
checkbox_school_spouse_yes: Section 1 Q6 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — SPOUSE row, YES box.
checkbox_school_spouse_no: Section 1 Q6 'Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?' — SPOUSE row, NO box.
checkbox_work_yes: Section 1 Q7 'Are you looking for work?' — APPLICANT row, YES box.
checkbox_work_no: Section 1 Q7 'Are you looking for work?' — APPLICANT row, NO box.
checkbox_work_spouse_yes: Section 1 Q7 'Are you looking for work?' — SPOUSE row, YES box.
checkbox_work_spouse_no: Section 1 Q7 'Are you looking for work?' — SPOUSE row, NO box.
checkbox_moved_yes: Section 1 Q8 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — APPLICANT row, YES box.
checkbox_moved_no: Section 1 Q8 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — APPLICANT row, NO box.
checkbox_moved_spouse_yes: Section 1 Q8 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — SPOUSE row, YES box.
checkbox_moved_spouse_no: Section 1 Q8 'Have you moved or entered a facility?' — SPOUSE row, NO box.
checkbox_warrant_yes: Section 1 Q9 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — APPLICANT row, YES box.
checkbox_warrant_no: Section 1 Q9 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — APPLICANT row, NO box.
checkbox_warrant_spouse_yes: Section 1 Q9 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — SPOUSE row, YES box.
checkbox_warrant_spouse_no: Section 1 Q9 'Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?' — SPOUSE row, NO box.
explain_changes: Free-text paragraph below 'Please explain all changes including income and submit proof:'. Verbatim transcription, exact punctuation/spacing/capitalization.
signature: APPLICANT's signature box at the bottom — return any visible mark (cursive, initials, single character, scribble). Different field from `name` (printed). Empty string only if the box is blank.
spouse_signature: SPOUSE's signature box at the bottom — return any visible mark. Empty string only if blank.
date: APPLICANT's signature date in the box labelled 'Date (yyyy-mmm-dd)'. Preserve the exact format printed/written on the form.
spouse_date: SPOUSE's signature date. Preserve the exact format printed/written on the form.
name: APPLICANT's printed full name in the 'Applicant Print Name' box. Verbatim, preserve case and spacing.
spouse_name: SPOUSE's printed full name in the 'Spouse Print Name' box. Verbatim, preserve case and spacing.
phone: APPLICANT's telephone number in the 'Applicant Telephone' box. Preserve format exactly as written (parens, hyphens, dots, spaces).
spouse_phone: SPOUSE's telephone number. Preserve format exactly as written.
sin: APPLICANT's Social Insurance Number. Preserve format exactly as written (hyphens, spaces, or no separators).
spouse_sin: SPOUSE's Social Insurance Number. Preserve format exactly as written.
applicant_net_employment_income: Section 2, row 'Net Employment Income', APPLICANT (left) column.
applicant_spousal_support_alimony: Section 2, row 'Spousal Support / Alimony', APPLICANT column.
applicant_workbc_financial_support: Section 2, row 'WorkBC Financial Support', APPLICANT column.
applicant_student_funding_loans_bursarie: Section 2, row 'Student Funding (eg: Loans, Bursaries)', APPLICANT column.
applicant_room_board_income: Section 2, row 'Room / Board Income', APPLICANT column.
applicant_private_pensions_retirement_di: Section 2, row 'Private Pensions (eg: Retirement, Disability)', APPLICANT column.
applicant_canada_pension_plan_cpp: Section 2, row 'Canada Pension Plan (CPP)', APPLICANT column.
applicant_tax_credits_gst_credit: Section 2, row 'Tax Credits (eg: GST Credit)', APPLICANT column.
applicant_child_tax_benefits: Section 2, row 'Child Tax Benefits', APPLICANT column.
applicant_income_tax_refund: Section 2, row 'Income Tax Refund', APPLICANT column.
applicant_other_income_money_received: Section 2, row 'All other income / money received', APPLICANT column.
applicant_income_of_dependent_children: Section 2, row 'Income of Dependent Children', APPLICANT column.
spouse_net_employment_income: Section 2, row 'Net Employment Income', SPOUSE (right) column.
spouse_spousal_support_alimony: Section 2, row 'Spousal Support / Alimony', SPOUSE column.
spouse_workbc_financial_support: Section 2, row 'WorkBC Financial Support', SPOUSE column.
spouse_student_funding_loans_bursaries: Section 2, row 'Student Funding (eg: Loans, Bursaries)', SPOUSE column.
spouse_room_board_income: Section 2, row 'Room / Board Income', SPOUSE column.
spouse_private_pensions_retirement_disab: Section 2, row 'Private Pensions (eg: Retirement, Disability)', SPOUSE column.
spouse_canada_pension_plan_cpp: Section 2, row 'Canada Pension Plan (CPP)', SPOUSE column.
spouse_tax_credits_gst_credit: Section 2, row 'Tax Credits (eg: GST Credit)', SPOUSE column.
spouse_child_tax_benefits: Section 2, row 'Child Tax Benefits', SPOUSE column.
spouse_income_tax_refund: Section 2, row 'Income Tax Refund', SPOUSE column.
spouse_other_income_money_received: Section 2, row 'All other income / money received', SPOUSE column.
